Dialog.name: MSG_734_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 5}I've covered the basics of combat now, but the most important thing is making decisions based on the situation at hand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_734_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}I'll continue providing support, but this time, go ahead and try fighting on your own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_734_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 0}You, my boy, are able to possess multiple Personas and summon them at will.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_734_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel a new potential within myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_734_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}Your Persona just now... It looks like you really do have a special power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_734_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 2} carries multiple Personas, and can switch which he summons by using Change Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_734_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Changing Personas will also change your stats, affinities, and usable skills based on the Persona you switch to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_734_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}During battle, open the Persona submenu to view skills, then press L1 or R1 to change Personas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_734_1_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can also change your equipped Persona outside of battle by pressing △ to open the menu, then navigating to the Persona submenu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_734_1_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can change Personas at any time, but in battle, you can only do so before taking action that turn.[n]{f 1 1}
